name: mycobrain-openclaw
description: MycoBrain IoT platform control via OpenClaw AI agent

serial.comment: UART to MycoBrain Side B ESP32-S3

telegram.comment: Set TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var to enable

discord.comment: Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN env var to enable

voice.comment: Requires reSpeaker XVF3800 connected via USB

sensecraft.comment: Set SENSECRAFT_ORG_ID, SENSECRAFT_API_KEY, SENSECRAFT_DEVICE_EUI env vars to enable

safety.comment: Estop all outputs if OpenClaw gateway loses serial connection
